12:41]Noita: Honestly it taken 2 weekends for me to make OpenClaw work in a container environment.
With Moltis it worked in 1 command.

Also I found several AI guardrails missing or turned off in OpenClaw which are again, working out of the box here. 

https://discord.com/channels/1469505370169933837/1469505371398996115/1488503462487654500

Noita: I'll agree, Moltis is way more performant and stable.
https://discord.com/channels/1469505370169933837/1469505371398996115/1488498690376204379

But I don't have enough yet. Please implement your suggested changes.
